name: Website Full Implementation
description: Complete Website implementation workflow: define site goals, install theme, build pages, configure e-commerce, optimize SEO, and launch.

steps.name: Define Site Goals & Structure
steps.description: Identify target audience, required pages, languages, domains, and integrations

steps.name: Install & Configure Theme
steps.description: Install a theme module, set brand colors, fonts, logos, and header/footer layout

steps.name: Build Core Pages
steps.description: Create homepage, about, contact, legal, and any custom pages using the website builder and snippets

steps.name: Configure E-Commerce
steps.description: Publish products, set categories, configure payment providers, delivery methods, and cart/checkout

steps.name: Setup SEO & Analytics
steps.description: Set page titles, meta descriptions, clean URLs, sitemap, social tags, and tracking scripts

steps.name: Configure Portal & Forms
steps.description: Enable customer portal, contact forms, CRM lead capture, and account pages

steps.name: Test & Launch
steps.description: Test responsive behavior, checkout flow, forms, and go live with domain mapping
